skillSlots.name: Swift Blade Slice
skillSlots.description: Passive: Normal Attack enhanced to strike 2 random targets, dealing Magical DMG equal to 80% ATK + 5% of target's max HP per hit (capped at 1× caster's ATK). This attack ignores 20% of target's DEF.

skillSlots.name: Fate Sever
skillSlots.description: Attack all enemies, dealing a total of 800% ATK Magical DMG (split equally among all hit targets; single target DMG capped at 3× caster's ATK). Additionally deal Magical DMG equal to 10% of target's current HP (capped at 2× caster's ATK). 100% chance to randomly assign 4 stacks of [Linked Fates] to enemies.

effects.name: Fate Weaving
effects.description: Normal Attack has 100% chance to apply [Linked Fates] to target and grants 20% Lifesteal Rate.

effects.name: Fate Weaving
effects.description: When an enemy with [Linked Fates] is attacked, take additional True DMG equal to 3% of current HP (capped at 1× caster's ATK).

effects.name: Fate Weaving
effects.description: Reduce damage taken by 30% when attacked by enemies with [Linked Fates].

effects.name: Fate Weaving
effects.description: Additional damage taken by [Linked Fates] carriers when attacked increased to 5% of current HP.

effects.name: Genesis I
effects.description: 30% chance for allies to apply 1 stack of [Linked Fates] to target on attack (max 1 trigger per ally per turn).

effects.name: Genesis II
effects.description: Increase DMG dealt by 30% when attacking enemies with [Linked Fates].

effects.name: Genesis III
effects.description: [Linked Fates] duration increased to permanent and stackable (max 30 stacks in PVE; unlimited in PVP). Each stack increases damage transfer ratio by 3%.

effects.name: Genesis IV
effects.description: If a target takes 4 instances of transferred damage in one turn, cast [Swift Slash] on them once (max 2 triggers per target per turn; max 5 triggers per turn total).

effects.name: Genesis V
effects.description: [Linked Fates] damage transfer target count +1. Carriers gain 1 stack of [Linked Fates] when taking transferred damage.
